text:
Generalist is a "jack of all trades" trader who runs a small shop inside the Village garage building in Area 05 and specializes in common goods.

After taking a small mental break, Generalist is once again back in business and ready to serve his loyal customers with decent prices.

Doctor is a trader who specializes in medicine and holds an improvised clinic inside an abandoned school building in Area 05.

After visiting Grandma for a "welfare check," Doctor returns to his clinic and is ready to provide medical services for the injured.

After the Area 05 evacuation and Border Zone demilitarization, things have started to take a wrong turn and a show of force is needed.

The Finnish military will start performing non-lethal, high-visibility aerial flybys with fighter jets that appear in the sky frequently.

Grandma's cat has gone missing after a sonic boom from a fighter jet spooked the cat and it ran away.

A few days ago, Nomads found the cat wandering in the Outpost and managed to capture it with some sort of box. Once the Nomads started to deliver the cat back to Grandma, they were ambushed by Bandits who apparently took the box.

Locals saw the Bandits tossing the box around in a cruel way and eventually leaving the box somewhere.

Punisher is a bandit boss and a feared debt collector in the Finnish criminal world.

Punisher and his minions have stolen a local police van and are taking routine drives across Area 05.

After a long delay, the Finnish military has once again started delivering airdrops to Area 05.

Airdrops usually contain humanitarian aid such as medicals, consumables and other relevant survival gear.

The military faction has started to use armored vehicles in the Vostok area.

Military BTR's are equipped with heavy machine guns and patrols have been seen across main roads and key locations.

The Border Zone demilitarization is starting to crumble and it is obvious that previous rules no longer apply.

While official sources ensure nothing has changed, attack helicopters have started making frequent patrols and airspace violations near the Border Zone.

After airspace violations, aerial incidents were unavoidable and multiple attack helicopters were shot down on both sides of the border.

Helicopter crash sites are scattered around multiple locations and contain high-value loot, which also makes them hotspots for AI activity.

`Outpost`

text:
Gunsmith is a trader who maintains a weapon storage inside one of the Outpost bunkers and specializes in everything related to firearms.

Gunsmith was nowhere to be seen for multiple months but according to rumors, he was taking a "business trip" to the other side of the border but has now returned to his beloved bunker in Area 05.

Given the previous events, the situation at the Border Zone is escalating quickly and nearby areas face the consequences.

Military BTR's can now enter the Outpost map and Area 05 is no longer considered safe.

News of the event spread quickly among Area 05 locals and traders, but it is only considered rumors by the media and authorities outside of Area 05.

After the Outpost was compromised, all traders started making preparations and leaving Area 05.

It seems that the traders are doing this as a temporary measure and will return if and when things calm down.

The escalation of recent events has seemed to stop and Area 05 did not spiral into full chaos.

All traders are returning back to Area 05.

The signal that started it all has suddenly reappeared.

The transmission is interfering with radio broadcasts and can be heard on all common frequencies.

This is the last event of Early Access [Build 1]. The events and story will continue in upcoming builds.
